evidence: frontend/src/App.tsx — route nested under ProtectedRoute with requiresAuth handle meta

frontend/src/components/DashboardLayout.tsx — applies data-bubble-id on shell root when pageBubbleId provided
frontend/src/pages/Chat.tsx — passes headerBubbleId and sidebarBubbleId to DashboardLayout
frontend/src/components/DashboardLayout.tsx — forwards instance ids to Header and AppSidebar
frontend/src/components/shell/Header.tsx — data-bubble-id={bubbleId} with chat override (defaults ai_RNbBKLUc)
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx — data-bubble-id={bubbleId} on Sidebar root with chat override (defaults ai_RNbBKLUe)
ir/inventory.json — ai_RNbBKLUj and ai_RNbBKLUk are CustomElement children of bTHDV
ir/slices/bTHDZ____root.json — ai_RNbBKLUj listed before ai_RNbBKLUk in slice entity order
frontend/src/pages/Chat.tsx — children wrapped in div with data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHXbD and data-module-owner MOD-DRSAM-CHAT

functional_audit.check: /chat route registered and auth-guarded via ProtectedRoute parent
Chat page mounts AppShellLayout (DashboardLayout) with page-level CustomElement instance overrides
Chat content bounded by ai_RNbBHXbD; chat-delete-popup and IR thread subtree correctly deferred to MOD-DRSAM-CHAT
evidence: ir/inventory.json — chat-delete-popup (Popup child of bTHDV) not mounted in shell scope

ui_evidence.notes: Page root on DashboardLayout outer wrapper when Chat passes pageBubbleId
Chat-specific header CustomElement instance on Header via bubbleId override
Chat-specific sidebar CustomElement instance on AppSidebar via bubbleId override
chat-main content boundary wraps page children with data-module-owner MOD-DRSAM-CHAT

gaps.finding: IR places ai_RNbBKLUj, ai_RNbBKLUk, and ai_RNbBHXbD as bTHDV siblings; React shell still nests Header inside the main column to the right of the sidebar (inherited from SHELL-05). Page-instance markers are correct but full-width header sibling layout remains unresolved.

critiques.finding: SHELL-10 added correct page-instance bubble ids (ai_RNbBKLUj/ai_RNbBKLUk) but did not restructure DashboardLayout to match bTHDZ sibling order (full-width header above sidebar+main row). Header remains nested in the right column per SHELL-05 shadcn SidebarProvider pattern.
critiques.alternative: Restructure DashboardLayout: offline banner → full-width Header (page instance) → flex row (sidebar instance | scrollable main containing only ai_RNbBHXbD children), aligning DOM hierarchy with IR page-root siblings.

critiques.finding: Decompose scope defers conversation UI and chat-delete-popup to MOD-DRSAM-CHAT, but brownfield implementation retains full prototype thread list and ChatWindow inside ai_RNbBHXbD. Ownership marker (data-module-owner) and chat-main boundary are present; IR conversation subtree entities and delete popup are correctly not wired.
critiques.alternative: If strict shell-only landing is required, replace prototype chat UI with a minimal placeholder inside ai_RNbBHXbD until CHAT-01+ lands; otherwise document brownfield retention as intentional in coverage preflight.

critiques.finding: frontend/src/lib/chat/routes.ts exports CHAT_ROUTE but authenticatedRoutes.tsx still hardcodes '/chat' string instead of importing the constant.
critiques.alternative: Import CHAT_ROUTE in authenticatedRoutes.tsx (and any navigate targets) for single source of truth.
